bottlenecks.label: 🎁 Claim Free Ocelot Stromberg
bottlenecks.solution: Visit The Vinewood Car Club
bottlenecks.detail: Free $3.2M vehicle for GTA+ members. Claim even if you won't drive it - free garage asset.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 3X Stunt Race Series THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Take advantage of 3X Stunt Race Series before it expires.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 3X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 2X Bunker Sell Missions THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Sell at ~25% stock ($175k base -> $350k this week) to guarantee a single delivery vehicle solo. Pairs with the FREE Lago Zancudo Bunker for new owners.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active but requires multiplayer. Consider briefly joining a friend’s org to earn the one-time challenge reward, then return to solo.

bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 5X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.solution: Pairs with 60% off Hangars + upgrades — cheapest week to enter the Smuggler business.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: 💎 60% off Hangars + mods (GTA+ Perk, stacks with event pricing)
bottlenecks.solution: Use 60% off Hangars + mods (GTA+ Perk, stacks with event pricing) before it expires.
bottlenecks.detail: GTA+ monthly perk. Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). Est. ~$0k/hr.

bottlenecks.label: Flying Skill Low
bottlenecks.solution: Buy Sparrow ($1.8M) OR do Flight School
bottlenecks.detail: No fast travel vehicle. Turbulence causes crashes and wastes time.

bottlenecks.label: No Kosatka Submarine
bottlenecks.solution: Purchase Kosatka ($2.2M) from Warstock for Cayo Perico access (~$560k/hr solo)
bottlenecks.detail: Unlocks Cayo Perico Heist — a solid solo active income source (~$700k avg per run).

bottlenecks.label: 💊 Not selling to Street Dealers
bottlenecks.solution: Visit 3 Street Dealers daily (~15 min for ~$202-250K). Requires MC businesses + Acid Lab stocked.
bottlenecks.detail: Street Dealers refresh daily at 07:00 UTC. Sell Cocaine, Meth, Weed & Acid for ~$250K/day average with premiums. Best $/minute ratio in the game.

bottlenecks.label: No Car Wash (passive income)
bottlenecks.solution: Purchase Car Wash ($1.5M) + feeders for up to ~$23K/hr passive income
bottlenecks.detail: Car Wash generates passive income. Add Weed Farm ($715K) and Heli Tours ($750K) as feeders to maximize earnings.

bottlenecks.label: 🎭 Nightclub Equipment Upgrade Missing
bottlenecks.solution: Buy Equipment Upgrade ($1.43M)
bottlenecks.detail: Production speed is 50% slower without this upgrade.

bottlenecks.label: 🎭 Nightclub Floors 1/5 (AFK Limited)
bottlenecks.solution: Buy Floors 2-5 ($5.30M)
bottlenecks.detail: AFK limited to 20 hours. With 5 floors: 66 hours (overnight safe).

bottlenecks.label: Nightclub Not Fully Optimized
bottlenecks.solution: Add more technicians and link feeder businesses.
bottlenecks.detail: 2/5 techs, 0/5 feeders. Missing up to 50% potential income.

bottlenecks.label: Maximize Stamina
bottlenecks.solution: Run, bike, or swim regularly to build stamina
bottlenecks.detail: Allows unlimited sprinting. Required for Mansion Yoga buff (+15% run speed).

bottlenecks.label: 🎰 Spin Lucky Wheel (2X Daily)
bottlenecks.solution: Go to Casino. Spin. Wait 5s. Spin again.
bottlenecks.detail: GTA+ gets 2 spins per day. Target: Podium Vehicle (Rebla GTS) or RP.
